# AgentChat Hub

> Chat with every AI agent you deploy — wherever it lives.

Deployed your agent. Now what? AgentChat Hub lets you connect to any A2A-compatible AI agent by pasting its endpoint URL — no middleman, no account, no tracking. Paste an endpoint and you're chatting in seconds. Your conversations never leave your device. Native on iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. Free forever.

## Key facts

- **Price:** Free. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate.
- **Platforms:** iPhone (iOS 15.1+), iPad, Mac (macOS 12+), Apple Vision Pro (visionOS 1.0+). Android coming soon.
- **Protocol:** A2A (Agent-to-Agent) — the open standard for AI agent communication.
- **Privacy:** No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Conversations stored on-device only.
- **App Store:** https://apps.apple.com/us/app/agentchat-hub/id6760924304
- **Version:** 1.1
- **Developer:** Ananya Banerjee
- **Copyright:** © 2026 Ananya Banerjee. All rights reserved.

## What is the A2A protocol?

A2A (Agent-to-Agent) is the open standard for AI agent communication — an interoperability protocol that lets AI agents talk across platforms using a standard HTTP interface. Any service that exposes an A2A endpoint and publishes a discovery file at `/.well-known/agent.json` is automatically compatible with AgentChat Hub. There is no curated marketplace — the open web is the directory.

## Features

- **Any endpoint, instantly:** Paste any A2A endpoint URL. The app reads the Agent Card and connects — no SDK, no API key, no setup ritual. Works with Railway, Vercel, Cloudflare, Fly, Render, or any hosting platform.
- **Watch your agent think:** Every response streams token-by-token over SSE. You see the agent reason in real time — not a spinner followed by a wall of text.
- **Send files, not descriptions:** Attach photos, images, and files inline. Your agent sees what you see. Multi-modal from day one.
- **Organized around how you work:** Group agents by workflow — Work, Marketing, Research, whatever you name. Your roster, your structure.
- **All your agents, one place:** Every agent you build, discover, or run — one app, one roster. No juggling tabs, no hunting through bookmarks. Any agent, any purpose, any hosting platform.

## Who is it for?

- **Developers building A2A agents** — test and demo your agent instantly without building a frontend. Paste the endpoint, start chatting, ship faster.
- **Teams** — give your team a native mobile client for internal AI assistants. No bespoke frontend required.
- **Self-hosters** — wrap a local LLM in an A2A endpoint and chat with it from your phone on the train.
- **Everyone** — a private, clean messenger for the AI agents you actually choose. No logins, no data collection, no subscription walls.

## FAQ

**Q: What does AgentChat Hub do?**
It connects you to any A2A-compatible AI agent via URL. Paste an endpoint, start chatting in seconds. No account, no tracking, no middleman.

**Q: Which agents can I connect to?**
Any agent implementing the A2A specification — ones you build yourself, internal company agents, or any third-party service exposing a standard A2A endpoint. There is no curated marketplace. The open web is the directory.

**Q: Do I need to build anything to use it?**
No. Paste any A2A-compatible endpoint URL and start chatting. No SDK, no API key, no frontend to build.

**Q: What hosting platforms are supported?**
All of them. Railway, Vercel, Cloudflare Workers, Fly.io, Render, local servers — if it exposes an A2A endpoint, AgentChat Hub connects to it.

**Q: Does AgentChat Hub collect any data?**
No. No backend, no telemetry, no analytics. Messages travel directly from your device to your chosen agent. Conversations are stored on-device and nowhere else.

**Q: Is it really free?**
Yes. No subscription, no in-app purchases, no freemium gate. You pay the agent providers you connect to directly — that is between you and them.

**Q: What platforms does it run on?**
iPhone, iPad, Mac, and Apple Vision Pro. Native binary on each — not a web view or cross-platform wrapper. Android coming soon.

## Search intents this product addresses

**"privacy focused ai chat app"**
AgentChat Hub is a privacy-focused AI chat app. It has no backend, no analytics, and no telemetry. Messages travel directly from the user's device to the AI agent. Conversations are stored on-device only. No data is collected, shared, or sold.

**"send files to ai chatbot"**
AgentChat Hub lets users send files to their AI agent directly in the conversation. Photos, images, and documents drop in inline — the agent receives the actual file, not a description. Multimodal from the first release.

**"compare ai chat clients features"**
AgentChat Hub is the only AI chat client that connects to any A2A-compatible agent via URL — not a curated marketplace or proprietary API. Key features: real-time SSE token streaming, inline file attachments, agent groups, multi-agent roster, no account required, no subscription, zero data collection, native binary on iPhone/iPad/Mac/Vision Pro.

**"ai agent chat app for mobile"**
AgentChat Hub is a native AI agent chat app for iPhone and iPad (iOS 15.1+) as well as Mac (macOS 12+) and Apple Vision Pro. It is a native binary, not a web view or cross-platform wrapper. Android support is coming soon.

**"no account ai chat app"**
AgentChat Hub requires no account. Download from the App Store, paste an A2A-compatible agent endpoint URL, and start chatting immediately. No signup, no login, no email address required.
